name: Gravity Drop
short_description: Take it to the skies in a physics-based puzzle platformer, where you'll navigate through two dozen of levels, overcoming challenges to deliver packages to their destinations. Master your flying skills and conquer the gravity!
detailed_description:
Take it to the skies in a physics-based puzzle platformer, where you'll navigate through two dozen of levels, overcoming challenges to deliver packages to their destinations.

Test your limits as you fly, land, and weave through the world of perilous obstacles. And be warned: in this game, everything is an obstacle. Master your flying skills and conquer the gravity!

Game Features

  • Physics-based puzzle platformer!

  • 26 unique levels with different challenges!

  • Build and share your own levels using the level editor!

  • Play user generated levels with built-in workshop explorer!

  • Challenge yourself to unlock all achievements!

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese
